footer.v: 1 - Phiếu nhu cầu, 2 - Đơn hàng mua

dir.commands:
&XMLWhenFilterLoading; &XMLWhenFilterClosing;
declare @id int if @name <> '' select @id = id from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where name = @name select @id = isnull(@id, 0) select '' as field, '' as message, 'set$VoucherFilter$(this, ' + rtrim(@id) + ');' as script return
